question: What is the very first line that must appear in every HTML file?
Which element displays the page title in the browser tab?
Which element is used for the primary content of a webpage, with only one allowed per page?
What is the purpose of the alt attribute in an element?
options: Sets the size of the image
Links the image to another page

question: Why should JavaScript <script> tags without defer be placed at the bottom of the <body>?
options: Scripts only work inside the body
It ensures the HTML is fully loaded before JavaScript runs
The head element does not support scripts
Scripts in the head cause syntax errors
answer: It ensures the HTML is fully loaded before JavaScript runs

question: What is the correct order of the CSS box model from outermost to innermost?

Which CSS method is recommended when you want one file to style the entire website?

What is the main difference between Flexbox and CSS Grid?
options: Flexbox is for colours; Grid is for fonts
Flexbox is one-dimensional, while Grid is two-dimensional
answer: Flexbox is one-dimensional, while Grid is two-dimensional

question: What does it mean that JavaScript is an interpreted language?
options: It must be compiled before running
The browser reads and executes it line by line
It only runs on a server
answer: The browser reads and executes it line by line

question: Which keyword should be used for a variable whose value may change?

What does the defer attribute do in a <script> tag?
options: Waits until the HTML is fully parsed before running
answer: Waits until the HTML is fully parsed before running
